key_findings: Article 11 split-check triggered: E0041 12/18-12/25 4 training_fee records total ¥9,764.73 cross AR-01 to AR-02 threshold requiring Dept Mgr+Financial Review
Daily cap exceeded: all 5 Dec training_fee (¥2,083-¥2,917) exceed internal ¥800/day and external ¥1,200/day per 05_training_expense.md Articles 3-4
Cumulative ¥11,920.81 exceeds ¥3,500 per-person-per-session cap per Article 2 of 05_training_expense.md
Historical contrast: repealed 2022 version had no split-check clause; 2025 Article 11 purpose-built for this pattern
No special_approval flag on any record; all approved at AR-01 only without Financial Review
unresolved_items: Internal vs external training classification per record
Whether 5 records relate to same training program
